name: alcovia
description: Offline-first study app with two-device sync (Focus Sessions + Syllabus Progress) and n8n automation.

scripts.install:all: cd apps/server && npm install && cd ../mobile && npm install
scripts.dev:server: cd apps/server && npx tsx watch src/index.ts
scripts.dev:client1: cd apps/mobile && EXPO_PUBLIC_CLIENT_ID=device-1 npx expo start --web --port 8081
scripts.dev:client2: cd apps/mobile && EXPO_PUBLIC_CLIENT_ID=device-2 npx expo start --web --port 8082
scripts.typecheck: cd apps/server && npx tsc --noEmit && cd ../mobile && npx tsc --noEmit
